---
name: Semantic concept request
about: Suggest the addition of a semantic concept for a property or values
title: Semantic concept for "insert property name please"
labels: agrischemas, property
assignees: ''

---

**What property would you like to suggest a semantic concept for?**
Please provide the name of the property.

**Which semantic concept would you like to suggest?**
Please provide a link. A semantic concept can either be used to describe the property itself or serve as a possible value for one of the existing properties.
